rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no operative relationship to Educ. Code §29.0091, which governs a strategic plan for early childhood disability education. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The agency, in collaboration with the Health and Human Services Commission and the Texas Workforce Commission, shall develop and implement a strategic plan to improve early learning and educational opportunities for young children with disabilities or developmental delays.
_note: No conflict; provisions address unrelated policy areas (property tax vs. early childhood special education planning).
